note: toHOL-purge ratchet: per-crate call-site counts of deprecated kernel surfaces. Counts may only DECREASE (regen via `bun run deps`); no crate is exempt. An increase fails CI and refuses regeneration — remove the new call site instead.

S5 family certs: thm/certs.rs Lit::from_term/to_term + per-family literal rebuild arms (the transitional reify target) and the ToHolIntVal/ToHolBytesVal reify rules

exceptions.reason: E2 defs-out-of-core: the term-op catalogue (defs/) + its literal-fixture tests moved from covalence-core into this crate (core dropped -5/-58 unfold/ctor counts in the same commit; total ctor count DECREASED 203->201). Relocation, not new surface.

exceptions.reason: EG3b tru/fal defined T/F bootstrap: the defs/logic.rs keystone test derives ⊢ tru at the PURE tier (Thm<CoreLang>) through the spec δ-unfold - the one in-core textual call site of the mechanism the derived connective calculus re-tiers onto

exceptions.reason: P2 kernel property campaign: tests/decl_only.rs pins that the unfold rule yields a CLEAN SpecHasNoBody error (never a junk theorem) for EVERY declaration-only (tm=None) spec in the registries — negative tests OF the deprecated surface, funneled through one textual call site
